# 📈 AI模拟盘 自动交易报告

本项目利用 Github Action 定时运行 Claude Code，并结合MCP工具，实现在欧易模拟盘环境下自动交易。

xychart
    title "模拟盘余额"
    line ## 资产明细
- **BTC**: $62013.0
- **ETH**: $7948.5
- **SOL**: $13021.8
- **USDT**: $0.2

## 交易记录
- 2026-02-10T09:07:01.140135 - Could not execute SOL trade - SOL-BTC pair not available
- 2026-02-10T09:07:01.140132 - Buy ETH using 0.01 BTC in ETH-BTC market order (Order ID: 3295447768773427200)
- 2026-02-10T07:18:17.415917 - Buy 0.0009 ETH at $2006.61, spent 1.806 USDT - ETH showing strong buy signal with RSI at 27.30 (oversold) and institutional accumulation
- 2026-02-10T05:45:21.300903 - Total equity increased from $83,671 to $83,356
- 2026-02-10T05:45:21.300902 - BTC balance increased from 0.866 to 0.896 BTC
- 2026-02-10T05:45:21.300900 - ETH trade: Reduced ETH holdings from 4.927 to 3.926 ETH
- 2026-02-10T05:45:21.300897 - Sold 1 ETH for 0.02962 BTC at rate 0.02962016296
- 2026-02-09T22:50:47.384441 - Buy 0.16568171 BTC at $70481.6, spent $11690.8 USDT
- 2026-02-09T21:05:55.448864 - Bought ~5.69 SOL with 500 USDT
- 2026-02-09T21:05:55.448861 - Sold 4.9 ETH at market price

## MCP工具
- [mcp-aktools](https://github.com/aahl/mcp-aktools): 用于查询价格走势及行情
- [mcp-okx](https://github.com/aahl/mcp-okx): 用于获取欧易账户信息和下单
- [mcp-notify](https://github.com/aahl/mcp-notify): 用于推送分析结果到指定渠道(可选)
- [mcp-hooks](https://github.com/aahl/ai-trading/tree/main/mcp-hooks.py): 用于保存交易结果和更新Readme
